title: 100pcs of Christmas Cupcake Cases with Cute Santa Claus Printed Design Mini Paper Muffin Cases for Baking
features: Pack of 100 mini cupcake cases with adorable Santa printed design.
This baking cups are ideal for Christmas parties, Birthdays, Weddings and many more occasions.
Lovely Christmas cup cake cases are coloured on the outside and white on the inside.
Ideal for all your mini cupcakes, muffins, confectionery and chocolates!
description: 100 PIECES OF CHRISTMAS THEME CUP CAKE CASES FOR BAKING Give your cupcakes, muffins, cookies, or chocolates the Christmas element festive vibes using our high-quality cupcake cases. Constructed odorless, durable, and food safe thick paper materials. Our Christmas cups are carefully made to prevent colors from fading after baking and are perfect for oven and microwave. AVAILABLE IN 4 DELIGHTFUL CHRISTMAS CHARACTER DESIGN: - Santa Claus - Penguin - Reindeer - Snowman Size: 30mm base x 20mm height Perfect Christmas party decorations for cupcakes, cakes, biscuits, cheese, chocolates and any other dessert dish. Great choice for Xmas, birthdays, wedding, anniversary parties. Try it now and EXPERIENCE THE MAGIC OF CHRISTMAS!!!
